boundary: This gate validates bounded graph RT sub-paths only. Visibility uses ray/triangle any-hit and is chunked in summary mode to avoid the global observer-target cross-product. BFS and triangle-count use explicit native OptiX graph-ray mode for candidate generation, while higher-level graph state management remains app/Python-owned.

cloud_claim_contract.claim_scope: OptiX ray/triangle any-hit traversal for graph visibility-edge filtering, plus explicit native OptiX graph-ray traversal candidate generation for BFS and triangle-count
cloud_claim_contract.non_claim: not shortest-path, graph database, distributed graph analytics, or whole-app graph-system acceleration; BFS visited/frontier bookkeeping and triangle set-intersection remain outside RT traversal

goal: Goal889/905 graph OptiX native traversal gate

records.error:
RTDL native oracle build failed while preparing run_cpu(...). Install GEOS development headers and pkg-config so the native oracle can link successfully (for example `libgeos-dev` plus `pkg-config`). Compiler command: g++ -std=c++17 -O2 -shared -fPIC /workspace/rtdl_python_only/src/native/rtdl_oracle.cpp -lgeos_c -o /workspace/rtdl_python_only/build/librtdl_oracle.so Tool output: /usr/bin/ld: cannot find -lgeos_c: No such file or directory
collect2: error: ld returned 1 exit status
records.label: optix_native_graph_ray_bfs
